HomePage.bio: Senior full-stack developer based in Kraków, Poland. I build e-commerce platforms and backend systems — mostly in the PHP and Magento ecosystem, with a growing focus on modern JavaScript and headless commerce. I've been doing this for 15+ years and still find the craft genuinely interesting. Away from code I have a PhD in Philosophy, which occasionally escapes into my writing.
